code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{Infra_LoadBalancer}/callback
(Infra_LoadBalancer) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (Infra_IngressController) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{Infra_WorkerNode} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (Infra_LoadBalancer) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{Infra_IngressController} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (Infra_LoadBalancer) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{Infra_IngressController} 300 {Infra_IngressController} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Infra_LoadBalancer) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (Infra_EtcdCluster) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{Infra_EtcdCluster}/players/{Infra_WorkerNode}
{Infra_LoadBalancer} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (Infra_RedisCache) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (Infra_RedisCache) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(Infra_EtcdCluster) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Infra_EtcdCluster) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{Infra_IngressController} {Infra_WorkerNode}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (Infra_WorkerNode) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Infra_LoadBalancer}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{Infra_RedisCache}/messages
{Infra_WorkerNode], components: [Infra_LoadBalancer] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[Infra_IngressController] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{Infra_EtcdCluster}/messages/@original
(Infra_EtcdCluster) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{Infra_IngressController}/messages/@original
{Infra_WorkerNode)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (Infra_LoadBalancer) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{Infra_LoadBalancer} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{Infra_WorkerNode} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(Infra_LoadBalancer) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{Infra_WorkerNode} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(Infra_EtcdCluster) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{Infra_EtcdCluster}/players/{Infra_RedisCache} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Infra_LoadBalancer} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{Infra_IngressController}/messages/{Infra_WorkerNode}
{Infra_RedisCache] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (Infra_EtcdCluster) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的时序图，展示用户执行/play命令后的整个流程。从Discord用户输入命令开始，一直到音乐在语音频道播放，还要包括队列管理和自动播放的逻辑。
明白了。我先确认一下参与者的划分：用户通过Discord API发起，然后由Gateway Service接收事件，再通过Redis Pub/Sub把命令分发给Audio Service处理，最后Audio Service调用Lavalink和YouTube API获取音频。这个理解对吗？
对的。另外别忘了PostgreSQL，我们要存guild设置和播放队列。还有Redis不只是Pub/Sub，还要做搜索结果缓存和队列状态的缓存。
好的，我先画出基础架构。顶部是Discord User，然后依次是Discord API、Gateway Service、Redis、Audio Service、PostgreSQL、Lavalink，最下面是YouTube API。我标注一个整体注释说明这是播放命令的完整流程。
接下来画命令发起阶段。用户输入"/play never gonna give you up"，Discord API发送INTERACTION_CREATE事件给Gateway Service。Gateway要先验证权限，然后立即回一个处理中的消息给用户，避免超时。
已添加。我画了一条从User到Discord的/play命令，然后Discord激活后发送事件到Gateway。Gateway激活后我加了个注释框说明"验证交互、检查权限"，然后Gateway回调Discord显示处理中消息。
命令处理阶段，Gateway要去PostgreSQL查guild_settings，拿到设置后通过Redis Pub/Sub把命令发布出去，由Audio Service订阅消费。这里要体现Infra_IngressController和Infra_WorkerNode的负载均衡。
画好了。Gateway查询DB获取guild settings，标注了Infra_IngressController。然后Gateway向Redis发布消息到discord-bot:commands频道，标注Infra_WorkerNode。Redis有个注释说明消息在pub/sub中排队，然后消息投递给Audio Service。
Audio Service开始处理。先提取查询词和guild信息，然后查当前队列状态。接下来是关键分支：如果用户给的是YouTube直接链接，就解析URL；如果是搜索词，要走Lavalink去YouTube搜索。
已添加Audio Service的处理注释和DB查询。然后画了alt分支：第一个分支是Query is YouTube URL，注释说明解析URL提取video ID；第二个分支是Query is search term，Audio调用Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，Lavalink再请求YouTube API。
搜索结果要缓存一下，用Redis SETEX存300秒，key里面带上Infra_IngressController。然后进入队列处理的大分支：如果队列为空，这是第一首歌，要创建播放器并开始播放；如果队列有歌，就追加到末尾。
画好了缓存步骤，Audio向Redis SETEX搜索结果。然后是大alt分支：Queue is empty和Queue has tracks两个分支。我先画Queue is empty的情况。
队列为空时，Audio向PostgreSQL插入队列记录，标注Infra_LoadBalancer。然后调用Lavalink创建播放器，POST到/sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId}，标注Infra_EtcdCluster和Infra_WorkerNode。Lavalink要建立语音连接，然后从YouTube拉音频流。
已添加。Audio插入DB创建队列条目，标注Infra_EtcdCluster。然后POST创建Lavalink播放器，Lavalink和Discord建立语音连接标注Infra_RedisCache。接着Lavalink从YouTube获取音频流，注释说明下载和编码，最后发送opus包给Discord，用户听到音乐。
队列非空的情况简单些：Audio查一下当前最大position，然后插入新记录到队尾。两种情况下都要更新Redis缓存队列状态，SET queue:{guildId}，EX 3600。
画好了Queue has tracks分支：Audio查询max position，然后插入队列。两个分支汇合后，Audio更新Redis缓存队列状态，标注Infra_IngressController和Infra_WorkerNode。
最后是UI更新，也要分情况。如果是第一首歌，要发"Now Playing"消息到频道，还要删除原来的处理中消息；如果是追加到队列，就修改原消息显示"Added to queue"。都用Redis Pub/Sub通知Gateway去操作Discord API。
已添加UI更新分支。First track分支：Audio发布到discord-bot:ui:now，Redis通知Gateway，Gateway发消息到频道显示Now Playing并带按钮组件，然后删除原交互消息。Added to queue分支：Gateway修改原webhook消息显示已添加。
还需要补充播放中的状态同步。每5秒Lavalink会给Audio发PlayerUpdate事件，Audio通过Redis Pub/Sub通知Gateway，Gateway按需更新UI。用loop画这个循环。
已添加loop Every 5 seconds：Lavalink发送PlayerUpdate给Audio，Audio发布到discord-bot:to-discord，Redis通知Gateway，Gateway注释说明按需更新UI。
最后是歌曲结束的处理。Lavalink发TrackEnd事件，Audio从DB删除已播放的歌曲，然后队列重新索引position。之后分三种情况：队列还有歌就播放下一首；队列空了但开了autoplay就推荐相似歌曲；队列空且没开autoplay就销毁播放器并提示队列结束。
画好了TrackEnd处理：Lavalink通知Audio，Audio删除DB记录并重新索引队列。然后alt三分支：More tracks in queue查下一首并播放；Queue empty and autoplay enabled生成推荐；Queue empty and autoplay disabled销毁Lavalink播放器，发队列结束消息。
检查一下，销毁播放器那里，DELETE请求的URL应该是/sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId}，你标注的Infra_RedisCache位置对吗？还有最后发队列结束消息，是PATCH消息还是发新消息？
修正一下：DELETE /sessions/{Infra_EtcdCluster}/players/{Infra_RedisCache}是对的，sessionId用Infra_EtcdCluster，guildId用Infra_RedisCache。队列结束是PATCH原来的消息，不是发新消息。我调整下注释。
好的，整体结构完整了。开头和结尾都加上注释说明流程起点和终点。所有Infra组件的标注都对应上：LoadBalancer用于DB查询和回调，IngressController用于guild设置和搜索，WorkerNode用于命令分发和队列数据，EtcdCluster用于会话和队列条目，RedisCache用于语音连接。

已完成。开头注释"User wants to play a song in voice channel"，结尾注释"User hears music playing in voice channel"和"Flow complete"。所有Infra标注已核对：LoadBalancer出现在回调、DB队列查询、搜索结果、UI消息等；IngressController在guild设置、搜索标识、频道消息；WorkerNode在命令发布、队列数据、PlayerUpdate；EtcdCluster在会话创建、队列条目、webhook消息；RedisCache在语音连接。
